title: Add Imagio  AI image generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Imagio  AI image generator](https://imagio-ai.vercel.app/) to image
- Imagio  AI image generator converts text prompts into original images using AI. It generates images in seconds.

Fixes #10143

gist.headline: Imagio joins the garden
gist.blurb: Another day, another app sprouting in the community greenhouse. Imagio AI turns text into pixels in seconds, and it's now officially on the showcase.
gist.summary: Added the Imagio AI image generator to the community app showcase in the Greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Imagio AI, a fast text-to-image generator, directly from the Pollinations app directory.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener in a digital greenhouse, watering a new plant that blooms into a glowing picture frame (representing an image generator app).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing code-plant in a digital greenhouse. The plant is blooming with a beautiful glowing picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing code-plant in a digital greenhouse. The plant is blooming with a beautiful glowing picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
